title: Foods to eat or avoid for TNBC
body:
Below there's a list of foods and spices that have been shown to be effective in inhibiting triple negative (TNBC) or ER-/PR- cell growth or proliferation. Also included are foods that incorporate significant levels of micronutrients that inhibit triple-negative breast cancer. In addition, this webpage lists foods, spices and supplements that appear to be risky because they (or significant incorporated compounds) have been shown to promote triple-negative breast cancer development, proliferation, growth or metastasis.

The food lists, updated continually as new research becomes available, have been developed based solely on the results of published academic studies. Clicking on any of the foods will take you to its webpage, which contains specific information concerning that food's relationship to breast cancer (including its overall ranking, for example, highly recommended or recommended in moderation) and links to supporting studies. 

--------------------------------------------------

Foods that reduce risk of TNBC 

Apples, Arctic char (Salmon fish), Artichokes, Arugula (leafy cruciferous vegetables), Basil Beans dry, Bell peppers, Black cumin (Nigella seeds), Black pepper, Blackberries, Blueberries, Buckwheat, Bok choy, Boysenberries, Broccoli, Broccoli sprouts, Brussels sprouts, Buckwheat, Butternut squash, Cabbage, Carrots, Cauliflower, Celery, Cherries, Chicken (organic), Chives (onions), Cilantro (Parsley), 
Collard greens, Cranberries, Cucumbers, Currants (black), Flaxseed, Flaxseed oil, Garlic, Ginger, Grapes (red, black or muscadine), Grape juice (purple), Green tea, Greens, Herring, Honey (min. processed), Horseradish, Hot peppers, Kale, Kefir, Kiwifruit, Kohlrabi Lake trout, Leeks, Lettuce (romaine), Mackerel, Mexican oregano, Mustard, Mustard greens, Olives and olive oil, Onions, Oregano, Paprika, Parsley, Peaches, Peas, Plums (purple or red), Pomegranates, Pumpkins, Radicchio, Radishes, Raspberries, Reishi mushroom tea, Rice (brown, black or red), Saffron, Salmon (wild), Sardines, Sauerkraut, Scallions, Seaweed, Sour cherries, Soybeans, Strawberries, Summer squash, Sweet potatoes  (purple), Thyme, Tomatoes, Turmeric, Turnips, Turnip greens, Walnuts & walnut oil, Watercress, Watermelon, Yogurt (low-fat), Zucchini


Foods to limit or avoid for TNBC

Alcohol, Apricots (dried), Bacon and other processed meats, Beef and veal (especially liver), Cheese, Corn oil, High fructose corn syrup, Indian mustard or black mustard, Lamb (especially lamb liver), Milk (full-fat), Nuts (especially Brazil nuts, cashews, hazelnuts, peanuts, pecans, pistachio nuts, & pine nuts), Pork and lard, Rice from Louisiana, Thailand or India, Safflower oil, Highly salty foods, Shellfish, Products made from defatted soy flour, such as soy protein isolate & textured soy protein, Soybean oil, Sugar, Sunflower seeds and sunflower oil

Source: https://foodforbreastcancer.com/articles/foods-to-eat-%26-avoid-for-triple-negative-%28er--slash-pr--slash-her2-%29-breast-cancer
